message:
🐛 Fix ClusterHealth card showing empty while data loads (#532)

* 📖 Update Chrome PWA install instructions to 'Open in app'

Chrome shows 'Open in app' button, not an install icon.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🎨 Set fixed size (520x320) for PWA widget container

Widget now displays in a compact wider container (520x320) centered on screen.
Also attempts to resize window on PWA launch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🎨 Add more padding to PWA icon for better dock appearance

Reduce logo size from 400px to 320px within 512px icon for more padding.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix PWA links to open in system browser instead of PWA windows

Use window.open with location/menubar/toolbar features when in standalone
mode to hint Chrome to open in a regular browser window with address bar.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix install button showing in already-installed PWA

Initialize isInstalled state with isStandalone() result so it's
detected immediately on first render in standalone mode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Restrict PWA scope to /widget so other URLs open in browser

Adding scope: /widget to manifest means clicking links to /dashboard,
/clusters, etc. will open in the system browser instead of PWA windows.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix PWA: use different origin to open browser + better standalone detection

- Swap localhost/127.0.0.1 to force Chrome to open in browser window
- Early return in useEffect if already standalone
- Clear installPrompt in standalone mode
- Listen for display-mode changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix ClusterHealth card showing empty while data loads

Show skeleton until initial fetch completes (lastRefresh !== null).
This prevents the empty card flash while waiting for cluster data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
